label: V1 — Initial redesign
notes: Full redesign from Typeform. Manrope font, brand colors, one-question-per-screen, calculator with closing cost breakdown, Sooner reveal, 23-step conditional flow.

label: V2 — Brand system alignment
notes: Updated highlight CSS (35% → 82%) for full letter coverage. All components verified against design system. No visual regressions.

label: V3 — Premium polish & delight
notes: 15-point upgrade: (1) Checkbox/radio dark-border checked states with yellow fill, (2) Verified highlight gradient, (3) Button hover with dark border, ghost→yellow fill, (4) Card hover yellow bg, (5) Input focus animated center-outward underline, (6) Step slide-up + fade-in transitions, (7) Highlight sweep animation on keywords, (8) Progress bar pulse/glow, (9) Number count-up animations in calculator, (10) Confetti + badge pop on success, (11) Input scale micro-interactions, (12) Choice card snap animation on select, (13) AED comma-formatted currency throughout, (14) Manrope enforced on all elements, (15) Consistent 48/24/8px spacing system. Ramp/Linear-level polish.
